channel.title: Becko Junior Camara
channel.description: Recent content on Becko Junior Camara

item.title: About
item.description: I am Becko Junior Camara, Sr. Business Analyst at Accenture. I graduated from the University of Nantes, France in 2017, with a Master degree (diplôme d’ingénieur) in computer science, with a concentration in Networking, Systems and Cloud. I’ve been working in Cloud Computing since I graduated (Sept. 2017). I’ve worked principally with AWS, I hold an AWS SysOps Administrator Associate certification (exp. 2021) and preparing for the Architect Associate certification. I have some knowledge as well about GCP and Tencent Cloud.
